content_body:
I find it distressing that only now that our party is preparing to leave do we consult this book to review the musings of those who vacationed here before us. Alas, the things we could've done that we are now out of time to do! Henceforth, I decree, we will read the guestbook at all future vacation rentals BEFORE the day of our departure! Still, we enjoyed our stay in the Blue Ridge Mountains to the utmost. 

Things we did: 

- Hiked the last two miles of the Appalachian Trail

- Enjoyed amazing food at The Butcher and Bottle (Ellijay), Chesters, General Ledgers (make reservations to eat in the vault!), The Vine (wine tasting, music, and charcuterie!), The Sweet Shoppe, and Harvest on Main (Best mulled wine this side of the Mississippi)

- Visited Mountain Man Comics

- Escape Blue Ridge: We made it it through two escape rooms with time to spare! 

- Mercier Orchards: Go for the atmosphere!

Things we wish we did more of: 

- Enjoy the outdoor deck and fireplace in the two hours before and immediately moments after susnset. It was glorious!

Final Thoughts:

We had a wonderful time! For the record, the ladies won the game of Sorry... Twice! Enjoy your stay here future visitors! Big thanks to our gracious hosts. You have a lovely home!
title: We Enjoyed Our Stay to the Utmost
